name: Roast Goose with Wild Rice Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Remove the goose from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature for about 4 hours.
3. Pat the goose dry with paper towels and season inside and out with salt and pepper.
4. Stuff the cavity with wild rice, onions, carrots, celery, and herbs of your choice.
5. Tie the legs together with kitchen twine and place the goose breast-side up in a roasting pan.
6. Cover the pan tightly with aluminum foil.
7. Roast for 2 hours at 325°F (165°C).
8. Remove the foil and increase the oven temperature to 425°F (220°C).
9. Cook for an additional 1 hour, or until the internal temperature of the leg reaches 165°F (74°C) when measured with a meat thermometer.
10. Let the goose rest for at least 20 minutes before carving.
